det_check_template:
proof fn det_create_entry_l2(pre_self_: PageTable, target_l4i: L4Index, target_l3i: L3Index, target_l2i: L2Index, target_l2_p: PageMapPtr, page_map_ptr: PageMapPtr, ?: Tracked<PointsTo<PageMap>>, post1_self_: PageTable, r1: (), post2_self_: PageTable, r2: ())
    requires (pre_self_.wf()), (pre_self_.kernel_l4_end <= target_l4i < 512), (0 <= target_l3i < 512), (0 <= target_l2i < 512), (pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l3(target_l4i, target_l3i).is_Some()), (pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l3(target_l4i, target_l3i).get_Some_0().addr
                == target_l2_p), (pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l2(target_l4i, target_l3i, target_l2i).is_None()), (pre_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_2m_l2(target_l4i, target_l3i, target_l2i).is_None()), (page_ptr_valid(page_map_ptr)), (pre_self_.page_closure().contains(page_map_ptr) == false), (pre_self_.page_not_mapped(page_map_ptr)), (page_map_perm.addr() == page_map_ptr), (page_map_perm.is_init()), (page_map_perm.value().wf()), (forall|i: usize|
                #![trigger page_map_perm.value()[i].is_empty()]
                0 <= i < 512 ==> page_map_perm.value()[i].is_empty()),
    ensures
        ({
            &&& (post1_self_.wf())
            &&& (post1_self_.kernel_l4_end == pre_self_.kernel_l4_end)
            &&& (post1_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure().insert(page_map_ptr))
            &&& (post1_self_.mapping_4k() =~= pre_self_.mapping_4k())
            &&& (post1_self_.mapping_2m() =~= pre_self_.mapping_2m())
            &&& (post1_self_.mapping_1g() =~= pre_self_.mapping_1g())
            &&& (post1_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l2(target_l4i, target_l3i, target_l2i).is_Some())
            &&& (post1_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l2(target_l4i, target_l3i, target_l2i).get_Some_0().addr
                == page_map_ptr)
            &&& (post1_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_2m_l2(target_l4i, target_l3i, target_l2i).is_None())
            &&& (post1_self_.kernel_entries =~= pre_self_.kernel_entries)
            &&& (post2_self_.wf())
            &&& (post2_self_.kernel_l4_end == pre_self_.kernel_l4_end)
            &&& (post2_self_.page_closure() =~= pre_self_.page_closure().insert(page_map_ptr))
            &&& (post2_self_.mapping_4k() =~= pre_self_.mapping_4k())
            &&& (post2_self_.mapping_2m() =~= pre_self_.mapping_2m())
            &&& (post2_self_.mapping_1g() =~= pre_self_.mapping_1g())
            &&& (post2_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l2(target_l4i, target_l3i, target_l2i).is_Some())
            &&& (post2_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_l2(target_l4i, target_l3i, target_l2i).get_Some_0().addr
                == page_map_ptr)
            &&& (post2_self_.spec_resolve_mapping_2m_l2(target_l4i, target_l3i, target_l2i).is_None())
            &&& (post2_self_.kernel_entries =~= pre_self_.kernel_entries)
        }) ==> det_create_entry_l2_equal(r1, r2, post1_self_, post2_self_),
{
{ASSUMES}}
